scripts.check: git -C ../.. ls-files -- apps/auth | xargs pnpm --dir ../.. exec ultracite check
scripts.db:generate: node ../../scripts/local-postgres-launcher.mjs -- sh -lc 'pnpm dlx @better-auth/cli@latest generate --config src/auth.ts --output src/domains/identity/authentication/infra/schema.ts --yes && pnpm exec drizzle-kit generate --config drizzle.config.ts'
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && portless --name auth.tskr node ../../scripts/local-postgres-launcher.mjs -- tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @workspace/email build && node ../../scripts/local-postgres-launcher.mjs -- sh -lc 'pnpm run db:migrate && vitest run'
